suggestions.match: > Over my career, I've written many PR's for dozens of 10,000-Star repositories. My modest contributions have landed in Node.js, Docker, Lodash, Bluebird, Gatsby, Rancher, Angular, React Router, Minio, MDN (Mozilla Developer Network) and many more.
suggestions.replacement: > Im Laufe meiner Karriere habe ich viele PRs für Dutzende von 10.000-Sterne-Repositories geschrieben. Meine bescheidenen Beiträge haben Einzug in Node.js, Docker, Lodash, Bluebird, Gatsby, Rancher, Angular, React Router, Minio, MDN (Mozilla Developer Network) und viele mehr gefunden.
suggestions.reason: The candidate left a large block of text in English. This needs to be translated into German.

rationale: The candidate 9c1dc446f0e3448b014f18da70e89d2100d6c0a0 is selected because it captures the energetic, informal tone of the original ('Lass uns loslegen', 'Drippin in Spenden') much better than the 'current' or 'qwen' versions, which feel more like literal, stiff translations. Although it missed translating one blockquote, the overall flow and vocabulary choice (e.g., 'aus dem Hut zaubern') are superior. The 'current' version has several grammatical errors in German (e.g., 'zu Open Source beitragen' vs 'beitragen zu Open Source' as a noun-like phrase).
